title: SlowBerryBeGone
description: Sweet Berry Bush will no longer affect entities' speed
body:
# SlowBerryBeGone
This is a very simple mod. It removes the Entity#makeStuckInBlock logic in sweet berry bush, so entities' speed will no longer be affected inside them.
# Misc
